task_completion.description: Rename the existing piano track to 'Music Bed'
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Ardour timeline or mixer view, the track header for the existing audio track should display the name 'Music Bed'.

task_completion.description: Import the voiceover audio onto a new track named 'Voiceover'
task_completion.visual_evidence: A second track named 'Voiceover' should be visible in the timeline, containing an audio region with a visible waveform.

task_completion.description: Edit the music bed to be approximately 15 seconds long with a fade-in and fade-out
task_completion.visual_evidence: The audio region on the 'Music Bed' track should end near the 15-second mark on the timeline ruler. The region should have visible diagonal fade-in and fade-out lines at its start and end boundaries.

task_completion.description: Adjust the 'Music Bed' track gain so it sits under the voiceover
task_completion.visual_evidence: The volume fader or gain numerical value for the 'Music Bed' track (visible in the track header or mixer strip) should be lowered, ideally showing a value between -3dB and -15dB.

task_completion.description: Mark the beginning and end of the spot with session markers named 'Spot Start' and 'Spot End'
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the marker lane at the top of the timeline, there should be a marker labeled 'Spot Start' near the beginning of the audio and a marker labeled 'Spot End' near the 15-second mark.
The Ardour window title bar should not display an asterisk (*) next to the project name, indicating there are no unsaved changes, or a screenshot should show the 'Save' menu action being executed.

integrity.description: Agent used the Ardour GUI to perform the edits
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the Ardour interface with mouse cursors, open menus, or active selections, rather than terminal windows modifying XML session files directly.

integrity.description: Agent imported actual audio rather than creating empty regions
integrity.visual_evidence: The 'Voiceover' track must show a genuine audio waveform inside its region, not an empty block.

integrity.description: Agent interacted with the real Ardour application
integrity.visual_evidence: The standard Ardour digital audio workstation interface must be visible, not a text editor or a mock application.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target length for the commercial is approximately 15 seconds (acceptable range is 10-20 seconds on the timeline). The fade-in should be between 0.5s and 5.0s, and the fade-out between 1.0s and 6.0s. The 'Music Bed' gain should be visibly reduced, ideally between -15 dB and -3 dB. The voiceover audio is a LibriVox narration, and the music is Beethoven's Moonlight Sonata.
